description_en: An old-style lion dance (shishimai), classified as a folk cultural property (other). It is town-designated by Wakuya, designated on 2000-06-28.

name_romaji: Sasaki-ke yashiki teien, oyobi hozon jumoku (keyaki san-bon, sugi ippon)
name_en: Sasaki Family Residence Garden and Preserved Trees (Three Zelkovas and One Cedar)
description_en: The garden of the Sasaki family residence together with its preserved trees, comprising three zelkovas and one cedar, classified as a monument (other). It is town-designated by Wakuya, designated on 2000-06-28. Located at Wakuya aza Koganehazama, Wakuya, Tōda District, Miyagi Prefecture.

description_en: The sarusuberi (crape myrtle) tree of the Watari family, classified as a monument (other). It is town-designated by Wakuya, designated on 1987-08-01. Located at Wakuya aza Shimomachi, Wakuya, Tōda District, Miyagi Prefecture.

The spirit hall (tamaya) of Date Sanuji, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at aza Izumigairi 87-2 (Daiōji Temple).

description_en: The main gate (sanmon) of Banshōzan Daiōji, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at aza Izumigairi 93 (Daiōji Temple).
